task_description: Migrate MSM Supermarket customer-facing web app from Next.js to Flutter Web. Create a new Flutter project at msm_app/ with routing, API layer, state management, UI widget system, build integration, and auth bridge API route. The existing Next.js admin/API backend remains unchanged.

verification.summary: flutter analyze: 0 issues. flutter test: 1/1 passing. flutter build web --release --dart-define=SITE_URL=https://msmsupermarket.in --base-href /app/: success. next.config.ts has rewrites, package.json has build:flutter script, app/api/flutter-auth/route.ts exists with full auth bridge logic.
